full_text:
Quan Cong (Zihuang) 全琮 (子璜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Cong (全琮), styledZihuang (子璜), was born in Wu. Son of Quan Rou and son-in-law of Sun Quan. Served Wu as general and advisor. Quan Cong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Quan Cong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Quan Cong, styled Zihuang, was from Qiantang county, Wu commandery. He was a son of Quan Rou.
